caption: A man with a tall, greyish-white hairstyle, glasses, and headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red and white bowtie and white suspenders. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands near a wall decorated with a framed black-and-white portrait and a logo of a shield. The text "UNIQUE FASHION" is partially visible on the wall. Across the bottom of the scene, the logos "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101" appear in red and white. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk and eventually raises his left hand in a gesturing motion. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up as he interacts with the microphone in a studio-like setting.
